stemHtml: A pain in the ear is worse during the descent than climb because..

options.a: during the descent the cabin altitude increases faster than the Eustachian tube can open.
options.b: during the climb the humidity in the middle ear is greater than that of the cabin.
options.c: the air in the middle ear is at a lower pressure than the cabin, closing the Eustachian tube and preventing pressure equalisation.
options.d: the air pressure in the inner ear increases more slowly than the cabin’s, extending the time taken to equalise the pressure between the middle ear and environment.
